title: centaurea × czetzii
intro: Centaurea × czetzii, also known as Knapweed or Centaurea, is a hybrid flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can be attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids. The health benefits of Centaurea × czetzii include relief from pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to support the immune system and reduce the risk of certain diseases. Herbal preparations of Centaurea × czetzii can be consumed as teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions with other medications.
